events.text: Goal!  Poland 0, Colombia 1. Yerry Mina (Colombia) header from very close range to the top left corner. Assisted by James Rodríguez   following a corner.
Jan Bednarek (Poland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Poland 0, Colombia 2. Radamel Falcao (Colombia) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Juan Fernando Quintero with a through ball.

Goal!  Poland 0, Colombia 3. Juan Cuadrado (Colombia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by James Rodríguez with a through ball   following a fast break.
Jacek Góralski (Poland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
